cta.title: Ready for your next match?
cta.subtitle: Join the biggest community of athletes and book your court in seconds.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.desc: Free registration in seconds. No credit card required.

step2.title: Choose the court
step2.desc: Filter by sport, location, time, and price.

step3.title: Book and pay
step3.desc: Immediate confirmation and receipt in your email.

step4.title: Play and enjoy!
step4.desc: Arrive on time and enjoy your match without bureaucracy.

t1.text: Finally found an easy way to book courts. In less than 2 minutes my match is confirmed!

t2.text: PlayHub transformed my management. Reduced calls by 80% and have full control of bookings.

t3.text: I recommend it to all my students. The platform is intuitive and support is excellent.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help. Send your questions, suggestions or partnership requests.
contact.successMessage: Your message was sent successfully! We will get back to you soon.

about.subtitle: The definitive platform connecting passionate athletes to the best sports courts — simple, fast and secure.
about.missionText: Make sports accessible. We believe that exercising, gathering friends and playing should be as simple as ordering food.
about.missionComplement: We built PlayHub to eliminate the bureaucracy between you and your next match. No calls, no unanswered messages — just book and play.
about.forUsersTitle: Your next match one click away.
about.forUsersText: Stop texting multiple arenas hoping for a free slot. With PlayHub you filter courts in your area, pick the perfect time, and book in seconds.
about.userFeature1Desc: Filter by sport, location, price, and real-time availability.
about.userFeature2Desc: See open slots on the map and book whenever you want, any time.
about.userFeature3Desc: Credit card or Pix — everything encrypted and protected.
about.userFeature4Desc: Share the booking link, split the cost and play with your friends.
about.forManagersText: Digitize your arena and end ghost time slots. Automate bookings, receive online payments, and have full control of your business.
about.forManagersComplement: Managers using PlayHub report up to 80% fewer calls and a significant increase in court occupancy rates.
about.managerFeature1Desc: Track revenue, occupancy, and trends directly on the dashboard.
about.managerFeature2Desc: Client reminders, cancellation alerts, and automatic confirmations.
about.managerFeature3Desc: Receive online payments without hassle. Money goes straight to your account.
about.managerFeature4Desc: Build reputation with real reviews from players on the platform.
about.diff1Desc: Encrypted payments and protected data. Your privacy is our priority.
about.diff2Desc: Immediate booking confirmation and receipt in your email within seconds.
about.diff3Desc: Over 12,000 active athletes. Find playing partners in your area.
about.joinUsText: Whether you are a weekend athlete or the owner of the biggest arena in town, PlayHub is your home.

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.text: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, update your profile, use our interactive features, or communicate with us. Types of information we may collect include your name, email address, phone number, and payment information.

usage.title: 2. Information Usage
usage.text: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, send technical notices, updates, security alerts, and administrative messages, as well as to respond to your comments and questions.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.text: We may share your information with court management partners to facilitate your bookings. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes without your explicit consent.

security.title: 4. Security
security.text: We take reasonable measures to help protect your information from loss, theft, misuse, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction. However, please remember that no system of transmitting or storing data over the internet is 100% secure.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By accessing and using the PlayHub platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, you should not use our services.

usage.title: 2. Platform Usage
usage.text: You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of third parties or restrict the use of the platform by any other person.

bookings.title: 3. Bookings and Cancellations
bookings.text: Booking and cancellation policies are set by each sports court administrator. PlayHub acts solely as an intermediary in the booking process.

liability.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: PlayHub is not liable for direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services.

errorBoundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong.
errorBoundary.description: We encountered an unexpected error while loading the application. Our team has been notified.
